name: Eternal
description: Cannot be removed or transformed from your [gold]Deck[/gold].

name: Ethereal
description: If this card is in your [gold]Hand[/gold] at the end of this turn, it is [gold]Exhausted[/gold].

name: Exhaust
description: Removed until the end of combat.

name: Innate
description: Start each combat with this card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Retain
description: Retained cards are not discarded at the end of turn.

name: Sly
description: If this card is discarded from your [gold]Hand[/gold] before the end of your turn, play it for free.
